channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Report: White House considers 250 pardons for US anniversary
item.description: White House aides discuss a plan for President Trump to issue 250 pardons tied to the nation's 250th anniversary celebration.

item.title: Federal agents raid home of anti-ICE activist linked to California farm violence
Jerome Powell's tenure ends as new Fed chair officially takes over
Trump receives red-carpet welcome in China; past trip shows limits of pageantry
item.description: Trump arrives in Beijing with a red carpet ceremony ahead of talks with Xi Jinping on trade tensions and the Iran war.
